items.text:
The alien children work hard to be able to control the color of their lasers.
Each time they achieve a new color, they get a diploma and move on to the next level.
Mason has a laser exam today.
If he successfully blasts his laser

qwen_content_pure_text.text:
The alien children work hard to be able to control the color of their lasers. Each time they achieve a new color, they get a diploma and move on to the next level.
Mason has a laser exam today.
If he successfully blasts his laser
Animation: purple spot appears in the center of the screen & disappears
he'll pass the exam.
